content:
Section: Battery System
Step 1: Power OFF vehicle and secure area
Step 2: Disconnect 12V battery (negative terminal)
Step 3: Wait 5 minutes
Step 4: Disable HV system using service disconnect
Step 5: Verify HV is disabled
Step 6: Remove access panel bolts (Torque: 45Nm)
Warning: High Voltage hazard. Ensure HV is disabled and wear PPE.
Applies to: VF8 2024 (v1.0.x)

Section: Charging System
Step 1: Power OFF vehicle and secure area
Step 2: Disconnect 12V battery (negative terminal)
Step 3: Wait 5 minutes
Step 4: Visual inspection and connector check
Step 5: Reconnect 12V and run functional test
Warning: Follow safety procedures to avoid short circuits.
Applies to: VF8 2022 (v1.3.x)
